name: Chicken in Broth with Sour Vegetable
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken by separating thighs, legs, and wings from the carcass. Chop them into bite-sized pieces.
2. Remove any bone splinters from the chopped pieces.
3. Chop the carcass into several pieces.
4. Drain the mustard greens and cut into 2-inch square pieces.
5. In a large pot, combine chicken and cold water. Bring to boil.
6. Skim any froth or chicken fat from the surface.
7. Reduce heat to simmer and cook for 2 hours.
8. Remove the chicken carcass from the pot.
9. Add the mustard greens and simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Transfer the soup, pieces of chicken, and mustard greens to a serving bowl.
11. Serve.
